description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Husband: Moshe b. David. Wife: Fāḍila bt. Mevorakh. Dated: Thursday, 21 Sivan 1391 Seleucid = 11 June 1080 CE. Location: Cairo (אלקאהרה הסמוכה לפסטט). It is signed by Aharon b. Avraham and Moshe b. Avraham ha-Kohen. Verso is blank. (Information in part from CUDL.) See also Goitein notes linked below(?).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
